name: perry-release-fixture-drizzle-sqlite
description: Tier-3 fixture: drizzle-orm + better-sqlite3 round-trip — schema declaration, insert, query with where clause, ordered select. SQLite chosen over postgres so the fixture has zero external service dependency. Note: pg-dialect-specific bugs (issue #585 shape) won't surface against sqlite — see drizzle-pg-pgproxy/ for that path (separate fixture).
